title: RegulatoryCompliance Output
description: Structured output from the regulatory-compliance skill assessment

decision.description: Overall compliance decision: PASS (all items verified), CONDITIONAL (minor/medium findings with remediation plan), FAIL (critical/high findings requiring remediation before deployment)

regulationsAssessed.description: List of regulations assessed (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, WCAG 2.1 AA, DPA)

subject.description: The system or artifact that was assessed

regulation.description: Regulation this finding relates to (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, WCAG)

category.description: Compliance category (e.g., Consent Management, Data Inventory, Accessibility)

description.description: Specific description of the compliance gap found

owner.description: Agent or role responsible for remediation (e.g., developer, devops, compliance-checker)

deadline.description: Remediation deadline (e.g., Before next deployment, 30 days, YYYY-MM-DD)

requiredMitigations.description: Mitigations required before deployment (for CONDITIONAL decisions)

evidencePaths.description: File paths to evidence or report files generated

regulatoryLinks.description: Links to authoritative regulatory sources consulted

nextReviewDate.description: Recommended date for the next compliance assessment

recommendedNextStep.description: Single recommended next action after this assessment
